cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
project(autonomous_patrol_system)

find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
find_package(ament_cmake_python REQUIRED)
find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)
find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
find_package(geometry_msgs REQUIRED)

# Generate Interfaces
rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME}
  "msg/AnomalyEvent.msg"
  "msg/AlertMessage.msg"
  "msg/MissionStatus.msg"
  "srv/SaveEvidence.srv"
  "srv/ResumePatrol.srv"
  DEPENDENCIES std_msgs geometry_msgs
)

# Install node modules into the same Python package generated by rosidl so
# runtime imports stay under autonomous_patrol_system.*
install(
  FILES
    autonomous_patrol_system/__init__.py
    autonomous_patrol_system/alert_dispatcher_node.py
    autonomous_patrol_system/cli_feedback_node.py
    autonomous_patrol_system/cyclic_patrol_node.py
    autonomous_patrol_system/environment_monitor_node.py
    autonomous_patrol_system/evidence_capture_node.py
    autonomous_patrol_system/mission_controller_node.py
  DESTINATION ${PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}
)

install(PROGRAMS
  scripts/cyclic_patrol
  scripts/environment_monitor
  scripts/evidence_capture
  scripts/alert_dispatcher
  scripts/cli_feedback
  scripts/mission_controller
  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME}
)

ament_export_dependencies(rosidl_default_runtime)
ament_package()
